notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the grub2 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 2 CVEs: CVE-2022-2601, CVE-2022-3775.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
